action.reasoning: Observation: Evaluation failed with RuntimeError - tensor dimension mismatch in decode_step. In predict.py beam_search, input_token is shape [1,1] but should be [1] (1D). The embedding on [1,1] produces [1,1,embed_dim] 3D tensor, which can't concatenate with 2D context. Analysis: Simple shape bug - need to change torch.tensor([[tokens[-1]]]) to torch.tensor([tokens[-1]]). The model trained 10 epochs with val_exprate ~7%. Decision: Fix predict.py, submit eval to get baseline score, then improve training.
action.command: python -c "import torch; t=torch.tensor([5]); print(t.shape); e=torch.nn.Embedding(10,8); print(e(t).shape)"
